summary: Tighten branch conventions and add Hermes Kanban sync
description:
Agents using this tool frequently drift from the branch/commit conventions
documented in the todo-implement skill (wrong branch, missing `todo:<id>`
commit prefix, squash-merging, forgetting to commit `.todo/`). Prose alone
isn't enough — turn the conventions into hard CLI preconditions and a git
hook that prevents the wrong commit message from being written in the
first place.

Separately, the user runs Hermes locally and wants ticket state mirrored
to its Kanban dashboard (HTTP plugin at /api/plugins/kanban/) for board-
style visibility. Push-only is fine; .todo/ remains the source of truth.

Done when: branch guards + a `todo install-hooks` command + `todo sync`
push-to-Hermes + an opt-in post-commit auto-sync all ship behind a clean
config in .todo/config.json. All children below closed.

resolution.note: All 4 children shipped: branch guards (dacf0f74), install-hooks (6784fb63), todo sync (e3b282d3), post-commit auto-sync (417cadb5). Final test count: 162. No regressions in the existing suite (127 → 162).
